description: Push-button shade for the whole seating area. The Vela's motorized cantilever opens, tilts, and closes at the touch of a remote, with a heavy-duty offset arm that keeps the pole out of your way. UV-tough canopy available in Deep Palm and Warm Sand.
Big shade, small footprint. The Costa's smooth crank-lift cantilever swings a full-size canopy over loungers and dining sets without a center pole. Fade-resistant fabric in Deep Palm and Warm Sand.

The classic pool side silhouette, done right. A crank-open market umbrella with a warm wood-look pole and push-button tilt that pairs perfectly with the Cabana dining set. Canopy in Deep Palm and Warm Sand.

Sculptural shade that floats over your deck. The Vista triangular sail is cut from breathable UV-blocking mesh with reinforced corners and stainless hardware for a taut, clean install. Available in Deep Palm and Warm Sand.
Set it and forget it. The Ancora's 40 kg stone-textured base anchors market umbrellas through gusty afternoons, with a bronze stem and thumb-screw collar that fits standard poles.
The table your summer gathers around. A round wood-grain top with a built-in umbrella port sits on powder-coated steel legs in Deep Palm, seating four in easy comfort.
Pull up a seat that stays comfortable past dessert. Solid teak frame, wide armrests, and quick-dry cushions in Warm Sand. Built to live outside all season.
Three seats of golden-hour comfort. The Cabana sofa pairs a sculpted teak frame with deep quick-dry cushions, anchoring your pool side lounge without blocking the view.
From upright to sun-nap in one motion. The Cabana lounger's multi-position backrest, smooth teak frame, and full-length cushion make it the most contested seat on the deck.
The little table that keeps everything within reach. Matches the Cabana collection with a light wood top and splayed legs, sized for drinks, sunscreen, and a good book.
A breezy tripod side table that goes wherever the sun does. The Isla's light-toned round top and weather-sealed finish make it the easiest upgrade to any lounge corner.
Greenery that can take the heat. The Duna's long rectangular trough wears a brushed bronze finish over a UV-stabilized body that won't fade, chalk, or crack in full sun.
Fresh towels, right where guests need them. The Brisa rolls pool side on locking casters, with woven storage below and a canvas canopy that keeps everything dry and sun-safe.
Instant privacy, zero digging. The Grata's slatted cedar screen stands on its own weighted feet, softening sightlines around outdoor showers, spas, and lounge corners.
Real wood underfoot in an afternoon. Teca's grooved hardwood slats snap together over any flat surface: No glue, no nails. Turning concrete into a warm deck.
Sure footing where it splashes most. Arena's anti-slip composite surface stays grippy when wet and cool in the sun, ideal for pool surrounds and high-traffic walkways.
Pizarra's stone-look porcelain tiles lay flat and level for a refined, low-maintenance pool side floor.
